title: FMD - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to see how it is displayed on the list and map
scenario: Find My Device list and map in Poly Lens Menu does not correctly update earbud and charge case display and connection status tags after disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
2. Connect both earbuds to the app via Bluetooth.
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Find My Device.
4. Observe the initial display of earbuds and charge case on the list and map.
5. Disconnect only the right earbud (e.g., place it in the charge case and close the lid, or turn it off).
6. Return to Find My Device screen and observe the display.
7. Disconnect both earbuds (e.g., place both in the charge case and close the lid, or turn both off).
8. Return to Find My Device screen and observe the display.
9. Reconnect the right earbud (e.g., remove it from the charge case and power it on).
10. Return to Find My Device screen and observe the display.
11. Reconnect both earbuds (e.g., remove both from the charge case and power them on).
12. Return to Find My Device screen and observe the final display.
expected:
Expected behavior varies by device model: 
- Osprey: Shows 3 parts (left earbud, right earbud, charge case) with connection status tags updating correctly after each disconnect/reconnect step.
- Tern/Emu: Shows 2 parts (left earbud, right earbud) with connection status tags updating correctly after each disconnect/reconnect step.
- Flamingo: Shows 2 parts (left earbud, right earbud) with connection status tags updating correctly after each disconnect/reconnect step.
